artifacts.title: Implement BM25 search in HighSignal
artifacts.description: Index a corpus of articles and serve ranked keyword search using BM25.
successCriteria: Index at least 100 documents
Support keyword search with a tokenizer shared by index and query
Return top-k ranked results scored by BM25
Add a small set of eval queries with expected results

artifacts.title: Hybrid search v0 in HighSignal
artifacts.description: Combine BM25 and vector retrieval with reciprocal rank fusion.
successCriteria: Run BM25 and vector retrieval over the same corpus
Fuse results with reciprocal rank fusion
Beat both single retrievers on the search eval set

artifacts.title: Search eval harness
artifacts.description: A reusable harness that scores any retriever against a labelled query set.
successCriteria: At least 15 labelled queries with known-good results
Computes recall@k, MRR, and nDCG
Can score any retriever via a common interface

artifacts.title: Brute-force vector index
artifacts.description: An exact nearest-neighbour index — the recall=1.0 baseline.
successCriteria: Insert and search vectors with a chosen metric
Return correct top-k via a k-sized heap
Benchmark query latency vs vector count

artifacts.title: Metadata filtering for vector search
artifacts.description: Add structured predicate filtering to vector search.
successCriteria: Support 'nearest WHERE field = value' queries
Implement both pre-filter and post-filter and compare
Always return k results when k are available
deliverables: Note on pre vs post filtering

artifacts.title: Recall / latency benchmark dashboard
artifacts.description: Plot recall vs latency for ANN parameter sweeps against the brute-force baseline.
successCriteria: Brute force used as the recall=1.0 ground truth
Sweep at least one ANN parameter
Produce a recall-vs-latency curve

artifacts.title: RAG pipeline v0
artifacts.description: An end-to-end retrieve → pack → generate pipeline grounded in a document corpus.
successCriteria: Ingest documents with a chunking strategy
Retrieve relevant chunks for a query
Generate an answer grounded in retrieved context
Have at least 10 eval questions

artifacts.title: LLM eval harness
artifacts.description: A dataset + grader harness that scores LLM output on every prompt/model change.
successCriteria: Fixed dataset of inputs with expected behavior
At least one deterministic grader and one LLM-as-judge grader
Runs as a single command and prints a score

artifacts.title: Model router
artifacts.description: Route each request to the cheapest model that passes evals for that request class.
successCriteria: Classify request difficulty
Dispatch to a cheap or strong model accordingly
Track cost and latency per route

artifacts.title: Reusable API key system
artifacts.description: Issue, hash, scope, and rotate API keys for machine clients.
successCriteria: Keys stored only as hashes
Prefix for log-searchability
Scopes and a revocation path

artifacts.title: Reusable rate limiter
artifacts.description: A token-bucket rate limiter usable as middleware.
successCriteria: Token bucket with configurable rate and burst
Returns 429 with a Retry-After header
Works across processes (shared store)

artifacts.title: Job queue with retries and DLQ
artifacts.description: A background job queue with backoff, jitter, and a dead-letter queue.
successCriteria: Retries with exponential backoff and jitter
Poison messages routed to a DLQ
Idempotent consumer handling

artifacts.title: Structured logging package
artifacts.description: A structured logger with a request correlation id.
successCriteria: JSON-structured log lines
Correlation id propagated through a request
Log levels and queryable fields

artifacts.title: Toy LSM tree
artifacts.description: A minimal LSM storage engine: memtable, SSTables, compaction.
successCriteria: Writes buffered in a memtable and flushed to immutable sorted files
Reads merge across files; deletes are tombstones
A simple compaction pass

artifacts.title: Toy write-ahead log
artifacts.description: An append-only WAL with crash recovery.
successCriteria: Append + fsync before acknowledging a write
Replay the log to recover state after a crash
Checkpoint/truncation to bound log size

artifacts.title: Object-storage-backed index
artifacts.description: Store index segments in object storage with a hot in-memory cache.
successCriteria: Index segments persisted as immutable objects
A cache in front of object storage
Cold-read latency measured and noted

artifacts.title: Search platform design doc
artifacts.description: An architecture doc for a search platform: ingestion, indexing, query, ranking.
successCriteria: Separate ingestion/indexing and query paths
Storage and segment/compaction story
Capacity estimate and failure-mode review

artifacts.title: RAG system design doc
artifacts.description: An architecture doc for a production RAG system with an eval gate.
successCriteria: Offline ingestion and online query pipelines defined
Eval harness as part of the architecture
Freshness/re-indexing strategy

artifacts.title: A/B test analysis report
artifacts.description: Analyze a mock or real experiment: check SRM, compute CI on the lift, interpret p-value and practical significance, and write a ship/no-ship recommendation.
successCriteria: Document sample sizes per variant and check for sample ratio mismatch
Report point estimate and 95% CI for the primary metric
State null/alternative, p-value interpretation, and Type I/II tradeoff in plain English
Recommend ship, iterate, or extend the test with a one-paragraph rationale
deliverables: Optional notebook or spreadsheet with calculations

artifacts.title: Simulate coin flips, dice, and random walks
artifacts.description: Code simulators (no stats libraries): Bernoulli trials, dice sums, and a 1D random walk. Plot or print distributions and compare sample mean to theory.
successCriteria: 10k coin flips: sample proportion within 0.02 of 0.5
Dice sum histogram matches triangular shape qualitatively
Random walk: report mean displacement and max |position| over T steps
deliverables: One paragraph: what matched theory vs sampling noise

artifacts.title: Implement mean, variance, correlation from scratch
artifacts.description: On a real CSV (or synthetic data), compute mean, variance, std dev, covariance, and Pearson r without pandas/numpy — loops only.
successCriteria: Functions: mean, variance (sample), covariance, correlation
Spot-check against a calculator on 5 hand-picked pairs
Document when you would use median instead of mean on this dataset

artifacts.title: Analyze a fake trading signal
artifacts.description: Given (or generate) a spurious 'alpha' signal on synthetic or historical noise, show why it fails: multiple testing, in-sample overfit, or non-stationarity.
successCriteria: Reproduce the 'great' in-sample metric
Show out-of-sample or holdout collapse
Name the statistical mistake (p-hacking, data snooping, regime shift, etc.)

artifacts.title: Weekly math writeup (public note)
artifacts.description: Explain one concept you drilled this week in your own words — derive or prove one step, include one mistake you caught yourself making.
successCriteria: No copy-paste from videos; prose is yours
Contains at least one worked example or derivation
States one assumption you had wrong and corrected

artifacts.title: Implement matrix multiplication from scratch
artifacts.description: General m×n by n×p matmul with nested loops; apply to a 2D rotation + scale transform on points.
successCriteria: Correct matmul on 3×3 test case vs hand calculation
Apply transform to ≥4 points; verify orthogonality preserved for pure rotation

artifacts.title: Least-squares regression from scratch
artifacts.description: Fit y = Xβ via normal equations (XᵀX)β = Xᵀy using your matmul — no sklearn. Report β, residuals, R².
successCriteria: Matches sklearn/polyfit on a 2-feature toy dataset within 1e-6
Plot residuals; comment on one outlier's leverage

artifacts.title: PCA from scratch
artifacts.description: Center data, compute covariance matrix, eigen-decompose, project to 2D. Visualize.
successCriteria: Top-2 eigenvectors explain ≥70% variance on a test dataset
2D scatter of projected points
One sentence: what the first principal component 'means' for your data

artifacts.title: Visualize linear projections
artifacts.description: Draw vector projection onto a line/subspace: show orthogonal residual. Connect to OLS geometry.
successCriteria: Diagram or plot: vector, subspace, projection, residual orthogonal
Numeric check: residual · subspace direction = 0

artifacts.title: Price data → daily returns pipeline
artifacts.description: Ingest adjusted close prices (CSV or free API), compute simple/log daily returns, handle missing days.
successCriteria: ≥1 year daily data for one ticker
Returns series with correct alignment (no look-ahead)
Sanity: mean daily return and count of trading days documented

artifacts.title: Volatility, Sharpe, drawdown, correlation matrix
artifacts.description: On 2–5 tickers: annualized vol, Sharpe (assume rf=0 or document rate), max drawdown, pairwise correlation matrix.
successCriteria: All metrics computed from returns you built (not pre-built risk APIs)
Correlation matrix symmetric, diag = 1
One paragraph interpreting whether diversification shows up

artifacts.title: Simple momentum backtest vs SPY/QQQ
artifacts.description: 12-month momentum rule on 1–3 names; compare cumulative return to SPY or QQQ over the same window. State assumptions and survivorship bias.
successCriteria: Rule written before seeing full-sample results (or use holdout half)
Equity curve: strategy vs benchmark
Honest limitations section (costs, slippage, overfitting)
